title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How involved are you in the local community where you live?
Are there any local issues that you feel strongly about?
What do you think could be improved most about your local area?
Do you know your neighbours well? Is that important to you?
What events or activities bring people together in your community?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: What do you think communities can do to help the most vulnerable people in society?
Do you think local communities are becoming stronger or weaker over time?
Is it possible to feel a strong sense of community in a big city?
